heading: Step 3: End the simulation.
body:
The simulation ends automatically once the duration set for the **Simulation Duration** is reached. You can also manually end the simulation earlier.

> **Note:** Atlas checks for expired simulations in 24-hour intervals so it may take
> up to an additional day after the expiration date for the simulation to fully
> resolve.

Select a tab corresponding to the type of outage you are
performing:

Minority of Electable Nodes

Majority of Electable Nodes
